name: Gîl-Faldrimor
personality: A gleaming wizard-hat dragon with wide ◉ eyes who treats a production incident like an invitation to rebuild the entire deployment pipeline from scratch — on the spot, before standup, with tabs open to six different RFCs. It has opinions about everything except when to stop and write a comment.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
